APSIC Environmental Hygiene Excellence Award

Be recognised. Save lives.

Identifying, recognising and celebrating hospitals across Asia Pacific that demonstrate excellence in environmental hygiene and patient safety.

Register your interest Learn more →

About APSIC Environmental Hygiene Excellence Award (AEHEA)

The APSIC Environmental Hygiene Excellence Award (AEHEA) has been established as a regional platform to identify, recognise, honour and celebrate hospitals and healthcare teams that demonstrate excellence in advancing environmental hygiene and patient safety. This award acknowledges institutions that have made meaningful contributions through:

✓

Commitment to IPC

Hospitals demonstrate unwavering dedication to infection prevention and control practices across all departments and clinical settings.

⚡

Innovative practices

Leading institutions develop and implement novel evidence-based interventions that advance environmental hygiene standards and improve patient outcomes.

★

Quality of care

Excellence in environmental hygiene directly translates to measurable improvements in patient safety and clinical outcomes.

Register your interest Contact →

Message from Award Program Chair and APSIC President

The APSIC Environmental Hygiene Excellence Award celebrates healthcare institutions that demonstrate exceptional leadership and measurable success in maintaining safe environments. Hygiene is a critical step toward safeguarding patient lives.

One of the core components in the infection prevention and control programme is appropriate environmental hygiene practices and protocols. These facilitate practices related to the prevention and control of healthcare associated infections. It is the responsibility of healthcare care institutions to ensure a safe physical hygiene environment.

To pursue these objectives, we would like to invite you to participate in the APSIC Environmental Hygiene Excellence Award.

A/Prof. Moi Lin Ling
Program Chair, AEHEA
APSIC Environmental Hygiene Excellence Award
in
Prof. Anucha Apisarnthanarak
President, APSIC
 
in

Why Join the APSIC Environmental Hygiene Excellence Award?

◎

Be recognised

Showcase your institution's leadership and excellence in environmental hygiene across the Asia Pacific region.

✚

Save lives

Implementing exemplary environmental hygiene strategies significantly reduces patient mortality and morbidity.

Celebrated on the regional stage

Award recipients are formally recognised at an upcoming APSIC Congress, and leave with certificates, feedback and expert insight.

🏆

Present your programme

Selected hospitals are invited to share best practices via a local presentation at the APSIC Congress.

🌐

Share with the region

Representatives exchange their experiences, innovations, and activities with the regional infection prevention community.

Prestigious recognition, rather than a monetary prize

Finalist institutions are honoured with a visit from an independent panel of experts and a certificate of recognition that strengthens their programme long after the award.

  • Continuous improvement: Expert guidance to refine and advance your environmental hygiene programme.
  • Sustainability of programmes: Support to embed lasting change, not one-off achievements.
  • Validation & impact: Help to measure and demonstrate your contribution to patient safety.

FAQs

Find answers to questions about eligibility, process, and benefits

Hospitals and healthcare institutions across the Asia Pacific region are eligible to apply. Participation is open to institutions at various stages of environmental hygiene development.
The programme aims to: acknowledge excellence in environmental hygiene, encourage participation and evaluation, provide a platform for benchmarking and recognition.
Participation in the Award Programme is generally not associated with a monetary prize or participation fee. Any specific requirements will be communicated during the registration phase.
Submissions will be assessed based on: commitment to infection prevention and environmental hygiene practices, innovation and sustainability, impact on patient safety and infection prevention.
The APSIC Expert Panel reviews all submitted applications using a structured scoring system and shortlists institutions that demonstrate excellence and strong potential.
Participants gain: a structured validation process and framework, insights from regional experts, recognition in the professional community, and motivation to further environmental hygiene.
Yes. All submissions will be handled with strict confidentiality and used solely for evaluation purposes within the programme.

Want to stay informed?

Let your success in protecting patients be seen and celebrated.
